ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "board" TEXT /* Name of the board associated with the project */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the project */,
  "license" TEXT /* License under which the project is released */,
  "path" TEXT /* File path to the project directory */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* The date when the project started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* The date when the project is expected to end */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed, paused) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category associated with the project */,
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the license associated with the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_license_id FOREIGN KEY ("license_id") REFERENCES licenses ("license_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Applications, Demonstrations) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the category encompasses */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "licenses" (
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license */,
  "license_name" TEXT /* Name of the license (e.g., SLA0044, BSD 3-Clause) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the terms and conditions of the license */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the license was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the license was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project associated with this version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the project */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was released */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* A description of changes made in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, project manager) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the documentation */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access device */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project associated with the document */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., PDF, DOC, source code) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category associated with the document */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the version associated with the document */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the document was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the document was last updated */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the document file in bytes */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file to ensure data integrity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_tags" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_tags_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_tags_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
